query:
UPDATE wa_conversations c
JOIN messages m ON c.lastMessageId = m.id
SET c.lastMessagePreview = m.content
WHERE m.messageType IN ('templateMessage', 'interactiveMessage', 'buttonsMessage', 'listMessage', 'listResponseMessage', 'buttonsResponseMessage', 'templateButtonReplyMessage', 'interactiveResponseMessage', 'orderMessage', 'productMessage', 'groupInviteMessage', 'pollCreationMessageV3', 'albumMessage', 'associatedChildMessage', 'editedMessage', 'viewOnceMessage', 'viewOnceMessageV2', 'placeholderMessage', 'lottieStickerMessage', 'pollUpdateMessage')
AND (c.lastMessagePreview IS NULL OR c.lastMessagePreview = '' OR c.lastMessagePreview LIKE '[%]');
